creator: george@omniti.com
text:
Under high throughput NFS, our webserver process (thttpd) consistently hangs in vmopar or objtrm.
The process get's stuck, can't be killed, and the machine must be rebooted.

How-To-Repeat: Run thttpd mounting an NFS doc root.  Generate 10-20Mb of sustained web traffic and start changing files on the shared mount point.
